caption: The video captures a panel discussion taking place on a stage with a modern, tech-savvy ambiance, highlighted by purple lighting and a large screen in the background. Three individuals are seated in wooden chairs, each equipped with microphones, suggesting an interactive session. The person on the left, dressed in a white shirt, is actively speaking, gesturing with their hands to emphasize points. The woman in the center, wearing a black t-shirt, listens attentively, her posture relaxed yet engaged. On the right, a man in a gray suit appears thoughtful, his gaze directed towards the speaker. The audience, partially visible in the foreground, seems attentive, indicating a lively exchange of ideas or information. The setting suggests a conference or seminar focused on technology or innovation, given the presence of what looks like a computer motherboard on the table in front of them.
